common.copy_link: If the button above doesn't work, you can copy and paste the following link into your browser:
password_reset.subject: Endurain - Password reset
password_reset.heading: Password reset request
password_reset.intro: You requested to reset your password for your Endurain account. Click the button below to reset your password:
password_reset.security_notice: This link will expire in 1 hour for security reasons.
password_reset.ignore: If you didn't request this password reset, please ignore this email. Your password will remain unchanged.
signup_confirmation.subject: Endurain - Confirm your account
signup_confirmation.heading: Confirm your account
signup_confirmation.intro: Thank you for signing up for Endurain! Please confirm your account by clicking the button below:
signup_confirmation.security_notice: This confirmation link will expire in 24 hours.
signup_confirmation.ignore: If you didn't create an Endurain account, please ignore this email.
admin_signup.subject: Endurain - New user sign-up pending approval
admin_signup.heading: New sign-up requires approval
admin_signup.intro: A new user has signed up and is awaiting approval:
admin_signup.review: Please log in to the Endurain admin panel to review and approve this request.
signup_approved.subject: Endurain - Your account has been approved
signup_approved.heading: Your account is now active
signup_approved.intro: Good news! Your account has been approved and is now active.
signup_approved.login_intro: You can now log in and start using Endurain:
